properties.name: urlfetcher.domains
properties.description: Map of domain configurations for URL fetching. Supported strategies are HTTP, PROXIFIED, and PLAYWRIGHT.

properties.name: urlfetcher.threadPoolSize
properties.description: Thread pool size for asynchronous URL fetching

properties.name: urlfetcher.record.enabled
properties.description: Flag to enable or disable recording mode (for test purposes only)

properties.name: urlfetcher.record.destinationFolder
properties.description: Destination folder for storing/retrieving recorded responses (used only in tests)

properties.name: urlfetcher.domains.*.playwrightProxyFallbackEnabled
properties.description: When true, failed or empty Playwright fetches are replayed with the domain proxy configuration.

properties.name: urlfetcher.domains.*.playwrightProxyRequired
properties.description: When true, Playwright starts every fetch for the domain through the configured proxy.

properties.name: urlfetcher.domains.*.proxy.scheme
properties.description: Proxy scheme used by proxified HTTP and Playwright proxy fallback.

properties.name: urlfetcher.domains.*.proxy.host
properties.description: Proxy host used by proxified HTTP and Playwright proxy fallback.

properties.name: urlfetcher.domains.*.proxy.port
properties.description: Proxy port used by proxified HTTP and Playwright proxy fallback.

properties.name: urlfetcher.domains.*.proxy.username
properties.description: Optional proxy username used by Playwright proxy fallback.

properties.name: urlfetcher.domains.*.proxy.password
properties.description: Optional proxy password used by Playwright proxy fallback.
